title: AuthorizedServiceProvider SD-JWT VC Schema
description: Schema for the Authorized Service Provider Attestation encoded as SD-JWT VC, based on the WE BUILD Attestation Rulebook for attestations of type Authorized Service Provider (Use Case SC5, eInvoicing) and draft-ietf-oauth-sd-jwt-vc

vct.description: Verifiable Credential Type — uniquely identifies the credential type. Always present in plain text. NOT selectively disclosable.

iss.description: Issuer identifier — a URI identifying the issuer of the credential (the authorising company's issuing system / EBW). As per RFC 7519. NOT selectively disclosable.

iat.description: Issued At — Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) indicating when the attestation was issued. NOT selectively disclosable.

exp.description: Expiration Time — Unix timestamp after which the attestation is no longer valid. NOT selectively disclosable.

nbf.description: Not Before — Unix timestamp before which the credential MUST NOT be accepted. Optional. NOT selectively disclosable.

sub.description: Subject — identifier for the subject of the credential (the authorised Service Provider legal entity). Optional. NOT selectively disclosable.

attestation_legal_category.description: Legal category of this attestation under eIDAS 2. For the Authorized Service Provider attestation this SHALL be 'EAA' (self-issued by the authorising company). NOT selectively disclosable.

schema_version.description: Version of the Authorized Service Provider attestation schema used. Optional metadata.

trust_anchor_url.description: URL at which a machine-readable version of the trust anchor used for verifying the attestation can be found or looked up. Optional metadata; for this EAA, trust is anchored in the issuer's EBWOID per Chapter 5 of the Rulebook.

cryptographically_bound_to.description: vct of the attestation on the same Wallet Unit to which this attestation is cryptographically bound (the Service Provider's EBWOID). RECOMMENDED per ARB_28. NOT selectively disclosable.

authorizing_company.description: The authorising company (Peppol corner C1 or C4) issuing the mandate. Mandatory. MAY be selectively disclosable.

legal_name.description: Registered legal name of the authorising company.

legal_id.description: Unique legal-person identifier (EUID) of the company, sourced from its EBWOID.

peppol_id.description: Peppol participant identifier of the company (scheme:value).

authorized_service_provider.description: The Service Provider / Access Point (Peppol corner C2 or C3) being mandated — the holder/subject. Mandatory. MAY be selectively disclosable.

legal_name.description: Registered legal name of the Service Provider.

legal_id.description: Unique legal-person identifier (EUID) of the Service Provider.

peppol_ap_id.description: Identifier of the Service Provider's Peppol Access Point (CN of the AP certificate, e.g. 'POP000123').

authorization_scope.description: One or more authorised operations per the code list in Section 2.8 of the Rulebook. SHALL contain at least one value. Mandatory. MAY be selectively disclosable.

authorization_valid_from.description: Date from which the authorization is valid (RFC 3339 full-date). SHALL NOT be later than authorization_valid_until when present. Mandatory. MAY be selectively disclosable.

authorization_valid_until.description: Date until which the authorization is valid (business validity, distinct from the technical exp claim). Optional. MAY be selectively disclosable.

tax_reporting_member_state.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code of the Member State for which the provider is authorised to perform tax reporting. Conditional: SHALL be present if and only if authorization_scope contains 'vida:tax_report' (integrity rule IR-ASP-02). MAY be selectively disclosable.

authorization_reference.description: Company-internal reference for the service agreement underlying the mandate. Optional. MUST be selectively disclosable (SD claim).

status.description: Status object per SD-JWT VC status-list mechanism. MUST be present when validity period is greater than 24 hours.

type.description: Status mechanism type. For SD-JWT VC Status List this SHALL be 'status-list'.

status_list_credential.description: URI of the Status List Credential that contains the bitstring indicating revocation status.

status_list_index.description: Zero-based index into the status list bitstring for this credential.

status_purpose.description: Purpose of the status entry. For the Authorized Service Provider attestation this SHALL be 'revocation'.

cnf.description: Confirmation claims per SD-JWT VC. Holder binding via JWK to the Service Provider's wallet is recommended.

jwk.description: Public key bound to the holder.
